kept.text:
The UK has just minted ANOTHER Deep Tech unicorn.

This one is a Cambridge university spin out that enables ultrafast charging in seconds.

Its technology is now powering AI data centres and warehouse robots around the world, and has seen revenue grow by 5x in the last year

The company, founded by Sai Shivareddy and Clare Grey, is @nyobolt. 

Today it has announced a $60m Series C round at a $1 billion valuation, led by Symbotic, with participation from IQ Capital and @latitudevc 

The UK's return to deep tech is strong.

LETS GO

profile_bio.description: Talking about UK and European Tech. Subscribe to my newsletter to keep up to date.

tweet.text:
오늘 애프터 마켓 실적 발표 예정 기업 (중요한 것만)

1. AI 인프라 및 반도체

***반도체 설계 및 IP: $ARM (Arm Holdings)

***광네트워킹/통신: $COHR (Coherent)

*양자 컴퓨팅: $IONQ (IonQ)

*AI 하드웨어/자동화: $SYM (Symbotic) - AI 기반 물류 자동화

*에지 컴퓨팅/보안: $FSLY (Fastly), $FTNT (Fortinet)

2. 에너지 및 소재

리튬/배터리 소재: $ALB (Albemarle) - 리튬 생산 세계 1위

에너지/석유 가스: $APA (APA Corp), $REI (Ring Energy), $MUR (Murphy Oil), $NEXA (Nexa Resources)

비료/농업: $NTR (Nutrien), $CF (CF Industries)

3. 친환경 및 재생에너지

태양광 및 ESS: $RUN (Sunrun), $ARRY (Array Technologies), $FLNC (Fluence Energy)

4. 소비재 및 서비스

음식료/배달: $BROS (Dutch Bros), $BYND (Beyond Meat), $DASH (DoorDash)

5. 우주항공 및 방산 (Aerospace & Defense)

우주/방산: $KTOS (Kratos Defense), $RDW (Redwire)

6. 기타 기술 및 산업 (General Tech & Industrials)

소프트웨어/광고: $APP (AppLovin), $SNAP (Snap Inc.), $MGNI (Magnite)
